title: Construct turf playing surfaces
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Construct turf playing surfaces demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare for construction activities

pcs.text: Read and interpret plans and specifications to determine scope of turf construction project
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read and interpret plans and specifications to determine scope of turf construction project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read and interpret plans and specifications to determine scope of turf construction project.

pcs.text: Collect representative soil samples for the site for testing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect representative soil samples for the site for testing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect representative soil samples for the site for testing.

pcs.text: Test soil samples and interpret and record results according to workplace procedures and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test soil samples and interpret and record results according to workplace procedures and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test soil samples and interpret and record results according to workplace procedures and industry standards.

pcs.text: Locate services and impediments to construction on site, and report discrepancies from construction plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate services and impediments to construction on site, and report discrepancies from construction plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate services and impediments to construction on site, and report discrepancies from construction plan.

pcs.text: Assess the surrounding area relative to construction site and identify potential impact on construction activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the surrounding area relative to construction site and identify potential impact on construction activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the surrounding area relative to construction site and identify potential impact on construction activities.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health, safety and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health, safety and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health, safety and environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Document a working plan for the construction
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document a working plan for the construction?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document a working plan for the construction.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan and prepare for construction activities

elements.title: Survey and peg out levels for construction site

pcs.text: Survey construction site and establish and record existing levels and temporary benchmarks according to turf construction and working plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Survey construction site and establish and record existing levels and temporary benchmarks according to turf construction and working plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Survey construction site and establish and record existing levels and temporary benchmarks according to turf construction and working plans.

pcs.text: Mark out construction site with new levels and contours according to specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mark out construction site with new levels and contours according to specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mark out construction site with new levels and contours according to specifications.

pcs.text: Read and interpret plans and specifications to determine measurements relevant to materials and quantities

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read and interpret plans and specifications to determine measurements relevant to materials and quantities.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure the interface between profile layers is uniform and unbroken.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure soil profile is level and consolidated within specifications ready for planting.
